strategy: Kravenly punishes shields with Shatter and cleans off any weakness or dispel you place, so protect the team by racing damage and using Triage rather than wards.
He fires Spirit Blast at the whole team at 75%, 50%, and 25% health, so burst through each threshold in one hit rather than parking just above it.

Manage the DoTs: he lays a 400-Death-per-round DoT at the end of Round 2 and every 5 rounds after, and detonates 5 DoTs for 2800 Death at the end of Round 5 and every 5 after. Use Shift or Triage to clear the DoT between detonates.
The hitter holding the most blades or traps draws his attacks, so keep that wizard healed and funnel blades to them late.
Blade the hitter and hit with Fire or Death (+35%, resists Life 80%), aiming to cross the 50% and 25% thresholds with big hits.
cheatNotes: Weakness, dispels, and other negative charms on him are removed instantly, so do not rely on them.
Every other round he hits a random wizard with 340 Life plus a 630 DoT, so keep the team topped up.
Stunning him does not stop that attack.
At 75% health he Spirit Blasts the whole team for over 1000, so heal for it or push past 75% fast.
At 50% he Spirit Blasts again; blow through this threshold in one hit.
At 25% he Spirit Blasts a third time; burst through it too.
His own Backlash can drop him past a threshold and trigger the blast.
Crossing multiple thresholds in one hit fires each blast in turn, so plan heals for a possible double blast.
End of Round 1 the Ghost Dog summons two minions that go active on Round 3, so clear or manage them.
End of Round 2 and every 5 rounds after he lays a 400-Death-per-round DoT for 10 rounds.
End of Round 5 and every 5 after he detonates 5 DoTs for 2800 Death to all, so clear DoTs before it lands.
Whoever holds the most blades or traps is his target, so keep that wizard healed.
Shift or Triage safely removes his DoT; time it between the Round-5 detonates.
Casting a shield makes him Shatter it off with a 0-pip cheat, so skip shields.
Mass Feint triggers the Shatter too, so protect it or avoid it.
Team shields like Legion Shield or Rebirth's armor trigger the Shatter for the caster only.
